data.name: 受孕之都歡迎您
data.detailed_description:
▌遊戲簡介

成為配種委員的你即將前往的地方是有著嚴重少子化問題的「種名市」。

在被冠上無種這污名的都市裡，為了要緩解人口少化的問題，

你勤奮地與住在都市裡的受精希望者進行配種！

▌遊戲特色

◆加深與住在都市裡的女性們之間的關係

完全不需要催眠、洗腦、強迫等等的行為！

你將透過體力、技術、包容力以及溝通能力（主角不會說話），破除女孩子們的心房！

沒有使用相同的點陣圖做修改變更，而是全都從頭開始繪製。

有著各種不同關係的女孩子們懷有各自的想法，等待著你的配種喔！

◆在各種各樣的設施裡進行配種吧

購物中心、百貨公司、速食店、神社、泳池、網咖、遊戲廳、公園等等，

在以全點陣圖細心描繪的地圖上，對女孩子們進行配種吧！

◆令人懷念的美少女遊戲風格

在街上相遇，進行對話（主角不會說話）

傾聽她們的煩惱，增進關係，做愛……

想不想在這座都市中，過上會讓人想起90年代經典美少女遊戲的快樂又溫馨的後宮生活呢？

透過雞雞串連起少女們的羈絆，少子化對策的模擬遊戲，正式開始！

▌遊戲精華

・無口無名的主角

・沒有催眠、洗腦、威脅、強姦、暴力

・主要女角全員傾心於主角（女配角有的專情有的任人騎）

・角色點陣圖皆為全新繪製

・具有高辨識度、可愛以及色情的點陣圖

・RPG製作大師MV製

・只限滑鼠操控

data.short_description: 為了解決生育率低下的問題政府訂定了「配種委員」機制。 只要有受精希望者提出種付的需求，配種委員就可以合法地對她們盡情播種！ 在「種名市」各處攻略女角們，努力播種解決少子化的問題吧！！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor

data.name: Breeding City Welcomes you
data.detailed_description:
▌Story

You are a breeding official that was sent to "Seed City", an area suffering from low birthrate.
To save this city from its tainted reputation and deal with the declining birthrate,
You will need to work hard to breed women begging to be impregnated in this city!

▌Game Characteristics

◆Deepen your bonds with the females that live here

No hypnosis, brainwashing, or rape required!
You will use your stamina, technique, open-heart, and communication skills (the MC does not speak)
To steal girl's hearts!
Each sprite was created from scratch, and not edited from the same base sprite.
Girls of different backgrounds with their own considerations await your seed!

◆Breed in all kinds of facilities

From shopping malls, department stores, fast food restaurants, temples, pools,
To internet cafes, game centers, and parks.
There are 3 times as many metropolitan facilities as there were in our previous title!
Breed these girls on the intricately designed pixel map!

◆A nostalgic gal-game style

Meet on the street and converse (the MC does not speak)
Listen to their troubles, increase your affections, and fuck...
In this city, you can live a happy and cozy harem life like in the nostalgic gal-games of the 90s!

Use your dick to build bonds with girls, and officially commence the simulation to combat declining birthrates!

▌Game Summary

・The MC has no name and doesn't speak

・No hypnosis, brainwashing, coercion, rape, or violence

・The female characters are all fond of the MC (they range from devoted women to whores who'll fuck anybody)

・All-new character sprites

・Cute and sexy high-clarity pixel art

・Made with RPG maker MV

・Only mouse-controlled

data.short_description: The government has created new laws supporting a system of "breeding officials" in order to deal with the declining birthrate. Breeding officials are free to impregnate those who request to be inseminated! Do your best to solve the issue of the declining birthrate!!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
